title: P2: Fix SignalR event name drift (StatusUpdated vs SnapshotUpdated)
description:
There's a three-way event name mismatch in the dashboard SignalR path:
- DashboardHubEvents.SnapshotUpdated constant uses "SnapshotUpdated"
- AgentBackgroundService.PushStatusToDashboardAsync (LIVE path) uses raw string "StatusUpdated"
- DashboardPublisherImpl.PublishStatusAsync (DEAD code) uses the canonical constant "SnapshotUpdated"
- JS client listener handles BOTH event names with a migration comment from Sprint 5A

The migration was never completed. If DashboardPublisherImpl is ever wired back in, the JS client will receive two updates per tick with different event names. Fix: Migrate ABS to use the canonical DashboardHubEvents.SnapshotUpdated constant and remove the JS fallback for "StatusUpdated".

Source: internal-audit-57-20260701.md — [PR-1]
